---
title: Articles
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
---

# Longform Essays

<div class="home-card">

## Dusty May

A look at how Dusty May built one of the most interesting programs in college basketball.

[Read article](/essays/dusty_may.html)

</div>

# Technical Posts

```{=html}
{{< listing posts >}}
